title: Auto Feed Animals
description:
Automatically feeds animals if there is food in hand

Button: 
    On Off: (Default: B)
body:
Automatically feeds cows and sheep if there is wheat in hand

Added all mobs (except Sniffer) their food from https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Breeding 

Button: "On Off" (Default: B) - Turns the mod on and off (values are not saved)
